title: Amscan Bright Pink Star Foil Balloon Weight (6oz.) - Pack Of 1 - Versatile Centerpiece & Anchor For Balloon
features: DAZZLING DESIGN: Add a touch of sparkle to your party with our Bright Pink Star Foil Balloon Weight! This stunning, versatile centerpiece is perfect for anchoring helium-filled balloons for birthdays, weddings, baby showers and more, catching everyone's eye with its iridescent finish.

HIGH-QUALITY Made from high-quality materials, this 6oz. balloon weight securely holds your balloons in place, ensuring they won't fly away or tangle during your event. Create beautiful balloon arrangements without worrying about them getting loose or drifting off.

MULTIPURPOSE: Not just for balloons! Our Bright Pink Star Foil Balloon Weight also makes a gorgeous table decoration on its own. Use it to add a touch of glamour to gift tables, dining areas, or make a statement by placing several together for a captivating centerpiece arrangement.

IDEAL GIFT & PARTY ACCESSORY: Looking for the perfect gift for a party-loving friend or family member? Look no further! This eye-catching balloon weight adds a touch of elegance to any celebration and is a practical gift they'll use time and time again.

EASY-TO-USE: Easily attach your balloon ribbons to the loop on top of the weight, and create stunning balloon bouquets in minutes. The compact size of our Bright Pink Star Foil Balloon Weight makes it both easy to transport and discreet when in use, so you can focus on enjoying your event.
description: Amscan.inc is the largest designer, manufacturer, and distributor of decorated party goods and party accessories in the world, founded in 1947.
